mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SbjctDAO.selectDgrsYrChrtList 설 명 : 학위년도/학위차수 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM, A.SMSTR_CHRT_ID, A.ORG_ID, A.DGRS_YR, A.DGRS_SMSTR_CHRT, A.SMSTR_CHRTNM, A.NOW_SMSTRYN FROM TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT A WHERE 1=1 AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.NOW_SMSTRYN = 'Y' ) WHERE RNUM = 1
